title: Object Generation
summary: Complete a partially built 3D object in Blender using staged reference views and export the required scene and OBJ bundle.
taskPrompt:
You are a 3D artist using Blender.

Your task is to complete one specific static object variant from a partial Blender scene.

Selected variant:
- `Toilet Object Generation` (`toilet`)

Agent-visible inputs:
- Partial Blender scene: `object_generation_toilet\input\partial.blend` containing the preserved scaffold and unchanged parts for this variant
- Input manifest: `object_generation_toilet\input\manifest.json` with the required exported part/object naming for this variant
- Whole-object reference images: `object_generation_toilet\input\scene_reference_images` showing the full target object from multiple views
- Missing-part detail/context references: `object_generation_toilet\input\parts` showing the missing geometry and placement cues

Required submission:
- Save the finished Blender scene to `object_generation_toilet\output\submission\final.blend`
- Export the final object bundle as OBJ parts into `object_generation_toilet\output\submission\objects`
- Export one OBJ for every required part/object name listed in the input manifest

Requirements:
- Reconstruct the missing geometry for this selected variant only
- Keep alignment with the staged partial scaffold and reference views
- Preserve the expected part/object naming from the input manifest
- Produce a coherent final object with a convincing final rendered look

inputFiles.name: partial.blend
inputFiles.description: input/partial.blend containing the preserved scaffold and unchanged geometry for the selected variant

inputFiles.name: manifest.json
inputFiles.description: input/manifest.json listing the expected exported part/object names for the selected variant

inputFiles.name: scene_reference_images
inputFiles.description: input/scene_reference_images/ with multi-view whole-object reference images

evaluation:
- final rendered result quality matters more than UV-specific implementation details
- hidden `reference/` data is evaluator-side only
- object-bundle checks are lightweight and mainly confirm a usable submission exists
- the selected variant, input manifest, and staged reference views define the concrete object scope; this is not an open-ended freeform modeling task

classifier.rationale: The task involves creating a 3D object in Blender, which fits within the 3D, Animation & Interactive Media subdomain.
